top_signals.title: BREAKING: STB conditionally accepts UP-NS rail merger application, wants more data
top_signals.summary:
The Surface Transportation Board accepted the merger application from Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern, on the condition that the partners submit more data for evaluation. 

The post BREAKING: STB conditionally accepts UP-NS rail merger application, wants more data appeared first on FreightWaves.
